note: Canonical V1 membership snapshot for Sale V2 recognition. root MUST equal the V1_MEMBER_ROOT baked into the deployed Sale V2 (0x0b883Ff08fE78146E4d81237dD7aE8A2a6502b48). Generated from contracts/tools/v1-merkle.json (StandardMerkleTree, leafEncoding [address]). count=2 V1 members. A fresh buyer (not listed) passes an empty proof and receives a new seat; a listed V1 member must pass THEIR proof so V2 continues their identity.
